_comment: Drives :cli:checkLicense (jk1 dependency-license-report). Entries are keyed per module, so a version bump that relicenses a dependency — or any new runtime dependency — fails the build until re-reviewed. License names are the normalized display names produced by license-normalizer-bundle.json; keep them in sync with LICENSE_TEXT_FILE in cli/build.gradle. The mallet module pulls in the cc.mallet tree (CPL/LGPL/BSD); separate jars in the distribution preserve the LGPL relink right.

allowedLicenses.moduleLicense: GNU Lesser General Public License, Version 3.0
GNU Lesser General Public License, Version 2.1
GNU Lesser General Public License, Version 2.1
GNU Lesser General Public License, Version 3.0
